Admin and frontend blueprints, CLI app management, "Hello World!" app, subdomain module, and environment variables.

## Folders
- **[blueprintapp](blueprintapp/README.md)**: Admin and frontend blueprints with routes, templates, and Flask app initialization in debug mode.
- **[cliapp](cliapp/README.md)**: Flask application instance creation, initialization, and management with multiple app definitions and error handling.
- **[helloworld](helloworld/README.md)**: Flask application and WSGI setup for returning "Hello World!" at the root URL.
- **[subdomaintestmodule](subdomaintestmodule/README.md)**: Flask module "foo" with subdomain "foo" and a static text file "Hello Subdomain".

## Files
- **[.env](.env.md)**: Environment variables for testing with values for FOO, SPAM, EGGS, and HAM.
- **[.flaskenv](.flaskenv.md)**: Environment variables for a Flask test application.
